data.description: Eldorado Gold meets 2025 production target, adds Dr. Sally Eyre to Board; releases 2026 plans and Q4 conference info.

data.title: WSP to offer $1 billion in senior unsecured notes, split into $500 million due in 2032 and $500 million due in 2036.
data.description: Montreal-based WSP Global Inc. (TSX: WSP) disclosed today the pricing details for its recent offering, raising a total of $1 billion. The offering includes $500 million in 4.003% senior unsecured notes maturing on January 22, 2032 (referred to as the “2032 Notes”), and another $500 million in 4.586% senior unsecured notes due on January 22, 2036 (known as the “2036 Notes”). The corporation aims to utilize the proceeds from this transaction for future investments and operational activities.

data.title: OceanaGold will release Q4 & full year 2025 results on February 18, 2026 after market close.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, OceanaGold Corporation (TSX: OGC) (OTCQX: OCANF) announced that it will be revealing its operational and financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended on December 31, 2025. The results are scheduled to be disclosed after the market closes on Wednesday, February 18, 2026.

data.title: Amcor (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) will report Q2 and half year results for fiscal 2026 on Feb 3, 2026, after market close.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Amcor plc is set to release its financial results for the second quarter and first half of fiscal year 2026, covering the three and six-month period ending on December 31, 2025. The announcement will occur after the closing of the US market on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. Investors can access the details of the results, along with a conference call and webcast, following the release. Amcor plc's stock ticker symbols are NYSE: AMCR and ASX: AMC.

data.title: LightPath Technologies (NASDAQ: LPTH) acquires Amorphous Materials, Inc. for large diameter glass melting technology.
data.description: In a recent development on January 20, 2026, in Orlando, Florida, LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH), a prominent player in next-gen optics, made a significant acquisition. The purchase will introduce exclusive large diameter glass melting technology for chalcogenide glass to the company's portfolio. This strategic move aims to enhance LightPath's offerings in the optics industry.

data.title: Banco Itaú Chile (SSE: ITAUCL) will release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 16, 2026 in Santiago.
data.description: Chilean financial institution BANCO ITAÚ CHILE (SSE: ITAUCL) revealed its plan to disclose the Earnings Report for the fourth quarter ending December 31, 2025, before the market commences on February 16, 2026, in Santiago.
Eldorado Gold experienced significant growth in Greece with key developments in 2026.

data.title: Ashland Inc. (ASH) will release Q1 fiscal 2026 earnings at 5pm ET on Feb 2, 2026. Conference call to follow.
data.description: Ashland Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ASH, is scheduled to announce its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 at around 5 p.m. Eastern Time on Monday, February 2, 2026. This release will provide stakeholders and investors with insights into the company's performance and may impact its stock price. Investors and analysts keenly await these figures to assess Ashland Inc.'s position in the market.

data.title: Smiths Detection establishes automated International Remote Baggage Screening System between South Korea and US, setting new global standard.
data.description: A Global leader in threat detection and security screening technologies, Smiths Detection, facilitated the implementation of an automated International Remote Baggage Screening System (IRBS) in Incheon, South Korea. This system has set a new global benchmark for aviation security and passenger processing between South Korea and the United States. Spearheaded by Incheon International Airport Corporation (IIAC), this milestone signifies a significant advancement in global aviation security. The system marks a groundbreaking innovation that will enhance security measures, benefiting the passengers and staff traveling between both countries.

data.title: Mitek (NASDAQ: MITK) to release Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 5, 2026, ended Dec 31, 2025, after market close. CEO and CFO to lead call.
data.description: A company specializing in digital identity verification and fraud prevention, Mitek Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MITK), revealed its financial results for the initial quarter of fiscal year 2026, concluded on December 31, 2025. The announcement is set to occur post the U.S. market closure on Thursday, February 5, 2026. The conference call and live webcast for discussions on the results will be conducted at 2 p.m. PT (5 p.m. ET). Leading the call will be Mitek CEO Ed West and CFO Dave Lyle, with a Q&A session to follow.

data.title: IQVIA will release its Q4 and full-year 2025 results on Feb 5, 2026, with a conference call scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: IQVIA Holdings Inc., a global provider of clinical research services, commercial insights, and healthcare intelligence, is set to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 5, 2026. The announcement will be made before the market opens, with the management team conducting a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. IQVIA is listed on the NYSE under the symbol IQV.

data.title: Teamshares gains $15 million EBITDA in 4Q 2025 pre-Nasdaq listing - set for merge with Live Oak Acquisition Corp. V.
data.description: In New York, Teamshares Inc., a tech-focused buyer of small-to-medium businesses, shared a business update showing ongoing growth and expansion. The company is progressing towards a projected listing on the Nasdaq in Q2 2026 through a merger with Live Oak Acquisition Corp. V (NASDAQ:LOKV). Teamshares recently finalized four acquisitions from retiring owners in the fourth quarter.

data.title: Progress Software stock rises post Q4 earnings beat. Q4 EPS: $1.51 (Est: $1.31). Follow PRGS price movement.
data.description: Shares of Progress Software Corp. (NASDAQ: PRGS) saw an increase during after-hours trading on Tuesday following the release of their fourth quarter earnings report and promising future guidance. The earnings report revealed that the company achieved a quarterly earnings per share of $1.51, surpassing the market estimate of $1.31. Additionally, the quarterly revenue figures also outperformed expectations. Investors are closely tracking the movement of PRGS stock as it responds to this positive news update. For further insights and details on this development, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Netflix reported Q4 revenue of $12.05 billion, up 17.6% from last year; EPS 56 cents, exceeding estimates. Paid subscribers surpassed 325 million. Regional revenue increases: UCAN $5.34B, EMEA $3.87B, LATAM $1.42B, APAC $1.42B. Stock drops on guidance.
data.description: Netflix reported fourth-quarter revenue of $12.05 billion, up 17.6% from the previous year. This beat the Street consensus estimate of $11.97 billion. The company also reported earnings per share of 56 cents, above the estimated 55 cents per share. Factors contributing to the higher revenue included higher pricing, membership growth, and increased advertising revenue. Netflix hit a milestone of 325 million paid subscribers during the fourth quarter. Revenue by regional segment: UCAN - $5.34 billion (+18% YoY), EMEA - $3.87 billion (+18% YoY), LATAM - $1.42 billion (+15% YoY), APAC - $1.42 billion (+17% YoY). For the full fiscal year, Netflix had revenue of $45.2 billion.

data.title: CA American Water boosts water supply by storing excess water in Aquifer. Program ongoing for over 2 decades.
data.description: In Pacific Grove, California, on January 20, 2026, California American Water is leveraging its 20-year track record of success by persisting with the Aquifer Storage and Recovery (ASR) initiative. This program entails storing surplus water during the rainy season to subsequently utilize during droughts. The company is aiming to capitalize on this process to ensure sustainable water management and address water scarcity issues.

data.title: Atlas Ocean Voyages introduces luxury expedition sailing yacht to expand global reach and reinforce position in luxury expedition cruising. New vessel is currently being built.
data.description: Atlas Ocean Voyages has unveiled its new Atlas-class vessel, demonstrating a strategic move to enhance its presence in the luxury expedition cruising sector on a global scale. The vessel is currently under construction, marking the line's foray into luxury expedition sailing. With this development, Atlas Ocean Voyages aims to expand its reach and solidify its standing within the industry. The announcement was made in New York on Jan. 20, 2026. The introduction of this new vessel signifies a significant milestone for the company as it ventures into the luxury expedition cruising market.

data.title: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) announces 2025 dividend allocation per share: $0.01 paid on 02/20/25.
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Ticker: ILPT) disclosed the dividend breakdown for 2025 tax-reporting purposes. For ILPT Common Shares, the dividend allocation per share amounts to $0.01. The record dates for this dividend were January 27, 2025, with the paid/payable dates falling on February 20, 2025. The dividend composition per share included $0.000 of Ordinary Income, $0.01 of Section 199A Dividend, $0.00 of Qualified Dividend, $0.00 of Total Capital Gain, $0.00 of Unrecaptured Section 1250 Gain, $0.00 of Section 897 Capital Gain, and $0.00 of Return of Capital.

data.title: Diversified Healthcare Trust reveals 2025 dividend allocation, $0.0100 per share, for tax reporting purposes.
data.description: Diversified Healthcare Trust (stock symbol: DHC) based in Newton, Massachusetts, released details regarding dividend allocations for the year 2025 tax reporting. The dividends for DHC Common Shares are as follows: Per Share Income Dividend of $0.0100, Unrecaptured Section 897 dividend of $0.0000, no Ordinary Dividend, no 199A Dividend, no Qualified Dividend, no Capital Gain Dividend, and no Capital Gain Return. The record date for these dividends is 01/27/25, with dividends paid/payable by 02/20/25.

data.title: Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) allocates 2025 dividends per share: Ordinary $0.01. No other dividend categories disclosed.
data.description: Service Properties Trust (SVC) based in Newton, Mass., revealed that for 2025 income tax reporting, dividends will be designated as follows: Each SVC Common Share will have an allocation per share for various categories including Ordinary Income, Unrecaptured Section 897 Gain, Section 199A Dividend, Qualified Dividend Income, Section 1250 Gain, and Capital Gain. The dividend amounts per share are $0.01 total, with $0.0000 for Unrecaptured Section 897 Gain, $0.0000 for Ordinary Income, $0.0000 for Section 199A Dividend, $0.0000 for Qualified Dividend Income, and $0.0 for Capital Gain. The dividends were paid or are payable on record dates falling on 01/27/25 and with payment dates on 02/20/25.

data.title: Mercedes-Benz of Arrowhead in Peoria, AZ is showcasing Certified Pre-Owned GLA SUVs, providing drivers in Phoenix area with a great selection.
data.description: Mercedes-Benz of Arrowhead in Peoria, Arizona, announced on January 20, 2026, that they are showcasing a range of Certified Pre-Owned Mercedes-Benz GLA SUVs. This presents drivers in Peoria and the wider Phoenix area with an attractive chance to purchase these vehicles.
